observations: 2026-03-05: Submitted TopN solution. Logic is correct. Two commits: 'commit solution' + 'fixed tests' — suggests tests didn't pass first time, possibly n==0 edge case.
Slice aliasing bug: returns original slice when n >= len(nums) — not a copy.
Algorithm approach works but is O(n*k*logk); should know about min-heap (O(n*logk)) for future.
Test structure is table-driven (good habit), but assertions only check length in TestTopN — not actual values.
Commented-out dead test committed to repo — minor hygiene issue.
Missing test cases: n==0 with non-empty input, n==len(nums), negatives, duplicates.
